MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Set For Trial On Apr-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

For Order That Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And Formonetary Sanction
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Hilco Receivables, LLC

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Hilco Receivables, LLC's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $240 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
